package.name: cortex_perception
package.description: Perception layer: turns raw sensor streams into symbols the cognition layer can act on. stt_node (AudioPCM -> speech-band filter -> Google Cloud STT bidi streaming -> transcript, with SpeakerState-driven echo cancellation) and vlm_node (camera scene + the active sub-task's success_check -> Verdict). Endpointing comes from the STT backend's is_final results; there is no separate VAD.
